title: Identity Preserved Nike Outfit High Fashion Pose Edit
sourceTitle: Identity Preserved Nike Outfit High Fashion Pose Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image high-fashion editorial pose edit for uploaded full-body fashion reference photo of the same woman, preserving identity and outfit while changing only the pose. Subject: Weight shifted naturally onto the back leg for a refined fashion-model stance. keeps the exact same face, facial features, hairstyle, expression, skin tone, body proportions, and overall identity with fixed outfit lock detail. Scene: Minimalist luxury fashion editorial setting with clean background, professional campaign attitude, and restrained magazine-style atmosphere. Composition: Change only to fixed pose instruction detail: one leg elegantly crossed in front of the other, body slightly angled to camera, one hand in trouser pocket, the other gently holding the sweatshirt hem near the waist, shoulders relaxed, chin slightly lifted, head subtly tilted. Style: Premium high-fashion editorial photoshoot vibe similar to Vogue, Elle, and Harper’s Bazaar, sophisticated, stylish, naturally directed, minimalist, and luxury-campaign ready. Color Palette: Preserve the uploaded outfit colors, especially navy sweatshirt, dark trousers, white sneakers, jewelry highlights, sunglasses tint, and clean editorial neutrals. Lighting: Soft luxury editorial light with flattering but identity-preserving facial detail, clean clothing texture, and natural shadows. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
